title: Blur Cascade, Liquid Glass, Proximity Type, Liquid Cursor, State Button
description: Five live UI demos: CSS view-timeline blur cascade, Apple Liquid Glass cards, proximity variable font, spring blob cursor, and morphing multi-state buttons.

drops.title: Scroll Timeline Blur Cascade
drops.description: Pure CSS blur-in stagger using animation-timeline: view() and animation-range. Zero JavaScript.
drops.concept: Each card self-tracks its own viewport entry via a named view-timeline. The animation plays only during the 'entry' phase, controlled by animation-range. Stagger is achieved by offsetting the range start via nth-child selectors — no JS scroll listeners at all.
drops.source: CSS scroll-driven animations spec + DEV Community 2026 deep-dive

interaction.scroll: Scroll down to trigger each card's blur-in reveal

drops.title: Liquid Glass Cards
drops.description: Apple WWDC 2026 Liquid Glass material in CSS: backdrop-filter + inset shadows + spring tilt + shimmer.
drops.concept: Liquid Glass is Apple's design language introduced in iOS 26 / macOS Tahoe. In CSS we approximate it by combining backdrop-filter blur+saturate+brightness, layered inset box-shadows for glass thickness, a sweeping shimmer pseudo-element on hover, and spring-overshoot cubic-bezier scale. A 3D tilt effect via JS mouse tracking adds the physical glass feel.
drops.source: CSS-Tricks: Getting Clarity on Apple's Liquid Glass + LogRocket: Liquid Glass effects CSS

interaction.mouse: Hover cards to trigger shimmer, tilt, and spring lift
interaction.click: Buttons toggle blur level and tint

drops.title: Proximity Variable Font
drops.description: Each character measures its distance to the cursor and maps it to font-weight (100–900) in real time.
drops.concept: Text is split into individual character spans. Every animation frame measures each character's bounding-box center distance to the cursor and uses a quadratic falloff curve to map proximity (within a configurable radius) to font-weight. Three modes: repel bold (nearby = heavy), attract (nearby = heavy), and wave (idle CSS-less oscillation). The effect exploits the 'wght' CSS variable axis present in all modern system fonts.
drops.source: Variable Font W3C spec + proximity interaction patterns trending on CodePen/Awwwards 2026

interaction.mouse: Move cursor near text to shift character weight

drops.title: Liquid Cursor Blob
drops.description: Spring-physics blob cursor that stretches in direction of travel and relaxes when still. Screen blend mode.
drops.concept: Replaces the system cursor with an SVG ellipse driven by spring physics (stiffness + damping). Velocity is computed per frame; the blob's rx/ry radii are stretched by velocity magnitude and rotated to the direction of motion — like a liquid drop being pulled. A secondary 'halo' ring follows at a slower spring rate. mix-blend-mode: screen makes it glow through any background.
drops.source: Liquid cursor experiments on CodePen community 2025-2026

interaction.mouse: Move to see stretch; hover buttons to see expansion

drops.title: Multi-State Action Button
drops.description: Buttons that morph idle → loading (pill to circle) → success (spring pop) → error (shake) via CSS state machine.
drops.concept: A state machine pattern driven by data-state attributes. Each state class applies different border-radius, min-width, background, and animation keyframes. The pill-to-circle morph during loading uses CSS min-width and border-radius transition. Success triggers a spring cubic-bezier scale-in. Error plays a horizontal shake. A CSS ripple emanates from the click origin. Includes a progress-fill variant and a toggle button.
drops.source: Vercel deploy button pattern + modern state-machine UI patterns

interaction.click: Trigger the state cycle — idle → loading → success/error → idle
